Built for every role in the learning journey

Pick where you belong and get straight to the dashboard made for you.

I'm a Student

Search verified tutors by subject, budget, and schedule. Get AI-matched recommendations and message teachers privately.

  • AI teacher matching
  • Book & join live classes
  • Track progress & certificates
Sign UpLog In

I'm a Parent

Manage one or more child profiles, set spending limits, approve tutors, and monitor progress — all from one dashboard.

  • Multi-child dashboard
  • Spending & tutor controls
  • Progress reports & alerts
Sign UpLog In

I'm a Teacher

Build a global tutoring business. Set your own rates, manage enquiries, and get paid securely after every class.

  • Global student reach
  • Flexible pricing & schedule
  • Secure, timely payouts
Sign UpLog In

How MyTuto works

Three steps from search to your first class.

01

Search & get matched

Tell us your subject, level, budget, and schedule. Our AI scores every tutor for compatibility and surfaces your best matches first.

02

Enquire, privately

Message a tutor without exposing contact details. Nobody's phone number or email is shared until a booking is confirmed.

03

Book & join live

Confirm a session and join over Zoom or Google Meet. Pay securely, track attendance, and download certificates when you're done.

Everything you need, nothing you don't

A marketplace designed around trust, privacy, and great teaching.

AI-powered matching

A weighted match score compares subject, level, budget, language, and availability — so search results are ranked by real fit, not just filters.

Privacy-first contact

Personal contact details stay hidden until a booking is confirmed. All messages are AI-monitored to keep the platform safe.

Simple credit wallet

Top up once, use credits to enquire and book. Automatic refunds if a tutor doesn't respond in time.

Live classes, built in

Sessions connect automatically to Zoom or Google Meet with join links and reminders — no extra setup required.

Verified tutors

Identity, education, and background-check badges are visible on every profile, so you know exactly who you're learning from.

Global reach

Multi-currency pricing and 40+ supported countries mean the right tutor is never limited by geography.

For Teachers

Turn your expertise into a global tutoring business

Join a marketplace built to help great teachers reach students anywhere — with the tools to manage bookings, payments, and performance in one dashboard.

Apply to Teach
  • Set your own hourly rate, per subject and per country
  • Get discovered through AI-powered student matching
  • Secure payouts within 48 hours of class completion
  • Free onboarding credits to get your first enquiries

Loved by students, parents & teachers

The AI-powered education marketplace connecting students, parents, and tutors worldwide.
